languages.text: {n}Батошски кажется опустошенным, но в тоже время на его лице читается странное облегчение.{/n} "Ну, вот и все. Обеты обновлены. Мы вверили свои жизни и судьбу в ваши руки, Лорд-капитан. Ждем ваших приказаний насчет Заркова и полка".

{n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's it. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fates in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски кажется опустошенным, но в тоже время на его лице читается странное облегчение.{/n} "Ну, вот и все. Обеты обновлены. Мы вверили свои жизни и судьбу в ваши руки, Лорд-капитан. Ждем ваших приказаний насчет Заркова и полка".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's that. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fate in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."

{n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's it. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fates in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."

{n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, as if he had resolved to take a step into a yawning chasm. And at the same time, his face shows a strange relief. {/n}"Well, that's that. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fate in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your decision on the fate of Zarkov and the regiment."

{n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's that. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fate in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."

{n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's it. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fates in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."

languages.text: バトシュスキーは、深い谷に足を踏み入れる決意をしたかのように、打ちのめされたように見えた。同時に、彼の顔には奇妙な安堵の色が浮かんでいた。「よし、これで終わりだ。誓いは更新された。命と運命は君に託した。ザルコフと連隊の運命は君次第だ」
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, as if he had resolved to take a step into a yawning chasm. And at the same time, his face shows a strange relief. {/n}"Well, that's that. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fate in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your decision on the fate of Zarkov and the regiment."

traits.locale_text: バトシュスキーは、深い谷に足を踏み入れる決意をしたかのように、打ちのめされたように見えた。同時に、彼の顔には奇妙な安堵の色が浮かんでいた。「よし、これで終わりだ。誓いは更新された。命と運命は君に託した。ザルコフと連隊の運命は君次第だ」

languages.text: {n}Batoshski a l'air d'un homme brisé, mais en même temps, son expression traduit un étrange soulagement.{/n} « Et voilà, les serments ont été renouvelés. Vous tenez maintenant nos vies entre vos mains, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous attendons vos ordres concernant Zarkov et le régiment. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's it. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fates in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski a l'air d'un homme brisé, mais en même temps, son expression traduit un étrange soulagement.{/n} « Et voilà, les serments ont été renouvelés. Vous tenez maintenant nos vies entre vos mains, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous attendons vos ordres concernant Zarkov et le régiment. »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski tükenmiş görünüyor. Aynı zamanda yüzünde garip bir rahatlama var.{/n} "Pekâlâ. Yeminler tazelendi. Hayatlarımızı ve kaderlerimizi ellerinize teslim ettik Lord Kaptan. Zarkov ve alayla ilgili kararınızı bekliyoruz."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's it. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fates in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski tükenmiş görünüyor. Aynı zamanda yüzünde garip bir rahatlama var.{/n} "Pekâlâ. Yeminler tazelendi. Hayatlarımızı ve kaderlerimizi ellerinize teslim ettik Lord Kaptan. Zarkov ve alayla ilgili kararınızı bekliyoruz."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski sieht aus wie ein gebrochener Mann, wirkt aber gleichzeitig auf seltsame Weise erleichtert.{/n} "Tja, das war's. Die Eide wurden erneuert. Wir haben unser Leben und Schicksal in Eure Hände gelegt, Lord Captain. Wir erwarten Eure Befehle, was Zarkov und das Regiment angeht."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's it. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fates in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski sieht aus wie ein gebrochener Mann, wirkt aber gleichzeitig auf seltsame Weise erleichtert.{/n} "Tja, das war's. Die Eide wurden erneuert. Wir haben unser Leben und Schicksal in Eure Hände gelegt, Lord Captain. Wir erwarten Eure Befehle, was Zarkov und das Regiment angeht."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski parece un hombre derrotado, pero, al mismo tiempo, su expresión muestra un peculiar alivio.{/n} «Bueno, pues ya está hecho. Los juramentos están renovados. Dejamos nuestras vidas y destinos en sus manos, Lord Capitán. Esperamos sus órdenes con respecto a Zarkov y al regimiento».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's it. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fates in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski parece un hombre derrotado, pero, al mismo tiempo, su expresión muestra un peculiar alivio. {/n}«Bueno, pues ya está hecho. Los juramentos están renovados. Dejamos nuestras vidas y destinos en sus manos, Lord Capitán. Esperamos sus órdenes con respecto a Zarkov y al regimiento».

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基看起来像被压垮了一样，但同时脸上又隐约带着一种异样的释然。{/n}“好，就这样吧。誓言已经重新立下。我们将身家性命全都交到您手里了，舰长大人。扎尔科夫和本军团听候您的差遣。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks like a broken man, but at the same time, his face shows a strange relief.{/n} "Well, that's it. The oaths have been renewed. We've put our lives and fates in your hands, Lord Captain. We await your orders regarding Zarkov and the regiment."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基看起来像被压垮了一样，但同时脸上又隐约带着一种异样的释然。{/n}“好，就这样吧。誓言已经重新立下。我们将身家性命全都交到您手里了，舰长大人。扎尔科夫和本军团听候您的差遣。”
